name: Sourdough Starter
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the lukewarm water into a half-gallon jar.
2. Add the yeast and sugar to the water, stirring until softened.
3. Gradually mix in the flour.
4. Cover the mixture with a clean cloth.
5. Allow the mixture to rise until it becomes light and slightly aged, approximately 2 days.
- The mixture may thin out over time; add more flour as needed.
6. When using the starter, replace an equal amount of flour and water each time.
